Xtate

Flagship Solution

Xtate

Xtate is our premier property management system, empowering landlords, agents, and tenants with full financial control and seamless maintenance tracking. The future of real estate is here.

  • 500+ Properties Managed
  • Automated Rent Collection
  • Tenant & Landlord Apps

Eight Powerful Modules

Everything you need to master your property portfolio.

Property CRM

Manage prospects, leases, and tenant relationships in one unified interface.

Finance & Rent

Automated invoicing, rent collection, and detailed financial reporting.

Maintenance Hub

Track repair requests, assign contractors, and manage work orders from your phone.

Tenant Acquisition Flow

A visual journey mapping our seamless onboarding process.

01

Market

List and share properties.

02

Screen

Automated background checks.

03

Sign

Digital lease execution.

04

Pay

Secure online deposit.

05

Move-In

Digital keys & welcome.

06

Home

Ongoing support & rent.

BOU HOLDINGS LTD

We specialize in building custom software and hardware to deliver value to your business in unparalleled ways. We enjoy making the lives of our clients easier using software to increase productivity and profit. Saving time and cutting costs gives us joy

  • We deliiver on time and provide the best quality
  • We are reliable and trustworthy
  • We are committed to excellence

We are a team of passionate individuals who love what we do. We are always looking for new challenges and opportunities to grow. We believe in the power of technology to change the world for the better.
